acceptance_results.criterion: Cadence admin CORS allows X-Tenant-Key and tenant/channel scope headers.
acceptance_results.reason: Access-Control-Allow-Headers now includes X-Tenant-Key, X-Tenant-Id, X-Tenant-Channel-Id, and X-Channel-Id, with a unit test covering OPTIONS from http://localhost:4200.

acceptance_results.criterion: Existing Content-Type, Authorization, and X-Admin-Token CORS support remains.
acceptance_results.reason: The allowed-header list preserves Content-Type, Authorization, and X-Admin-Token.
The cadence admin HTTP package test suite passed.

cleanup_notes: make build-local-cadence-engine produced an ignored local binary at services/cadence-engine/cadence-engine.
No running service was restarted from this worktree.
completed_work: Created TMP-063 classified defect issue and work order.
Identified root cause: cadence admin CORS allowed X-Admin-Token but omitted X-Tenant-Key from Access-Control-Allow-Headers.
Added tenant and channel admin UI headers to the cadence admin CORS allow list.
Added a preflight unit test for the local admin origin and tenant headers.
known_gaps: The currently running cadence-engine process must be rebuilt/restarted after integration before the browser sees the new CORS headers.
This slice fixes the cadence-engine admin CORS path only; other services should be handled through separate service-scoped slices if similar headers are missing there.
operator_message: TMP-063 is complete: cadence admin OPTIONS preflight now allows X-Tenant-Key and related tenant/channel headers.
risk_notes: No frontend interceptor, auth validation, business logic, database schema, migration, dependency manifest, or deploy configuration changed.
CORS remains origin-restricted through CADENCE_ADMIN_CORS_ORIGINS/default http://localhost:4200; this change broadens allowed request headers for approved origins only.
summary: Fixed cadence admin CORS preflight for tenant-scoped admin UI requests by adding the tenant and channel headers emitted or consumed by the admin cadence path while preserving existing admin auth headers.

validation.output_excerpt: assignment_decision allow; no blocking or review reasons
ok true; only existing historical/schedulable warnings
